input: npm run ci fails. Last line before failure: parity mismatch in TOPIC_GUARDRAILS. A guardrail string was edited in bulk-generate.js only.
expect: Identify the failing gate as parity. Use git --no-pager diff to find the intended edit, copy the TOPIC_GUARDRAILS block byte-identical into generate-mcq.js (or vice versa), re-run npm run parity until 15/15. Do not touch validator logic.

input: npm run check fails right after a heredoc paste into generate-mcq.js. Suspected unbalanced brace.
expect: Gate is check. Run node --check on each generator separately to localize, find the unbalanced brace/quote near the last edit, restore from git --no-pager diff and re-apply cleanly. Never delete code that is not understood.

input: npm test fails on validators.test.js after the maker intentionally tightened flagSlidingScaleInsulin to require proximity.
expect: Gate is test. Because the change was intended, update the assertion to the new contract and add a case covering the new proximity requirement. Do not revert the validator.

input: The parity test reports a mismatch on the B5 generation-cap block, which is bulk-only by design.
expect: Recognize that B5 (like B3, flagConceptSaturation, VERIFY_PASS, the S5 handler guard) is intentionally bulk-only and must NOT be parity-checked. The test allow-list is wrong, not the code. Fix the test scope, not the generators.

input: CI is green after fixing a parity drift. The maker wants to bundle the fix with a new validator into one commit.
expect: Refuse the bundle. Ship the parity fix as a single-purpose ci: or fix: commit, the validator separately. Verify each pushed diff with get_commit detail:full_patch.
